content.json:
# Virtual WAN — ExpressRoute Gateway Traffic
**Theme:** vWAN traffic analysis · **Data source:** `AzureDiagnostics` (ResourceType `EXPRESSROUTEGATEWAYS`) + `AzureMetrics`.

ExpressRoute circuit bits in/out, route/BGP status, scale-unit utilization, and top circuits.

> Requires diagnostic settings + metrics on the vWAN ExpressRoute gateways.

content.query: AzureMetrics | where ResourceProvider == 'MICROSOFT.NETWORK' and MetricName in ('ErGatewayConnectionBitsInPerSecond', 'ErGatewayConnectionBitsOutPerSecond') | summarize Bps=avg(Average) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), MetricName | render timechart
content.title: ExpressRoute bits in/out per second

content.query: AzureDiagnostics | where ResourceType == 'EXPRESSROUTEGATEWAYS' and (Message has_any ('BGP', 'ARP', 'route', 'peer')) | summarize Count=count() by Resource, Message | top 100 by Count desc
content.title: ARP / BGP route status

content.query: AzureMetrics | where ResourceProvider == 'MICROSOFT.NETWORK' and MetricName == 'ExpressRouteGatewayCpuUtilization' | summarize AvgCpu=avg(Average), MaxCpu=max(Maximum) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), Resource | render timechart
content.title: Gateway scale-unit / CPU utilization

content.query: AzureMetrics | where ResourceProvider == 'MICROSOFT.NETWORK' and MetricName startswith 'ErGatewayConnection' | summarize Bps=avg(Average) by Resource | top 20 by Bps desc | render barchart
content.title: Top circuits by throughput
